description: Calculates a linear estimate for growth between two points (x0, y0) and (x1, y1) based on a given x value.
Checks if the segment defined by (x0, y0) and (x1, y1) is degenerate (x1 equals x0).
Applies clamping based on the y-range of the segment instead of the x-range.
Clamps the calculated y value to the lower bound of the segment's y-range.
Clamps the calculated y value to the upper bound of the segment's y-range.
